character_buff.name: Defend Mode
character_buff.description: Your structure gets invincible for 5 sec.

skills.name: Detection
skills.description: Reveals invisible characters and locates hidden objects.

skills.name: Critical Disease
skills.description: Builds a trap that releases a poisonous cloud of smoke when triggered.

skills.name: Invisible String
skills.description: Set a booby trap that deals Physical Damage to enemies. (Also applicable to flying monsters.)

skills.name: Explosion
skills.description: Sets an explosive trap that blocks attacks from several enemies at the same time.

skills.name: Fence Construction
skills.description: Builds a fence that obstructs enemy movement and prevents them from advancing.

skills.name: Spike Trap
skills.description: Constructs a trap which fires a sharp projectile.

skills.name: Rotating Blade Const.
skills.description: Manufactures a whirling sword that attacks adjacent enemies.

skills.name: Concen. Ward Const.
skills.description: Constructs a ward that increases power.

skills.name: Great RB Construction
skills.description: Manufactures a whirling sword that attacks adjacent ground and airborne enemies.

skills.name: Deep Straight
skills.description: Impales the enemy on a sword before delivering a powerful kick.

skills.name: Earth Tremor
skills.description: Plunges sword into enemy while airborne.

skills.name: Penta-Train
skills.description: A series of aggressive attacks that pushes the enemy back.

effects: Double Damage to enemies with [Soft Armor]
Double Damage to enemies with [Soft Armor]

skills.name: Vortex Slash
skills.description: Make a series of fast and powerful attacks.

skills.name: Hexen Dropper
skills.description: Slashes mercilessly with a set of double swords.

skills.name: Dust Devil
skills.description: Kicks up a vicious dust storm that envelops enemies in the vicinity.
skills.target: Up to 5 Enemies within a range of 2.5m

skills.name: Bane of Gladiator
skills.description: Pierces the enemy and then strikes at his head.

skills.name: Violent Shooting Star
skills.description: Stabs abdomen of enemy many times with a crazy speed.

skills.name: Defensive Tool
skills.description: Builds a structure which recovers HP of nearby structures. Only 1 unit available.

effects: Increases structure HP recovery and frequency of recovery according to DEX stats
Increases structure HP recovery and frequency of recovery according to DEX stats

skills.name: Enhanced Rotating Blade Build
skills.description: Builds an enhanced rotating blade which can use a stronger attack. Only 3 units available.

skills.name: Shock Field Construction
skills.description: Builds a ward which causes Electrical Field to nearby enemies. Only 3 units available.

effects: 20% chance to inflict [Electrical Field] on enemy while attacking
20% chance to inflict [Electrical Field] on enemy while attacking

skills.name: Ground Shaker Construction
skills.description: Builds a ward which creates a shock wave to knock-down nearby enemy. Only 1 unit available.

effects: Increases chance to use [Ground Shake] skill according to DEX stats
Increases chance to use [Ground Shake] skill according to DEX stats

skills.name: Flame Riser Construction
skills.description: Builds a ward which delivers a huge fire attribute damage to nearby enemy. Only 1 unit available.

skills.name: Charge
skills.description: Charges enemies down with a sword.

skills.name: Vertical Slash
skills.description: A powerful downward slash. It inflicts triple damage on large monsters and Double Damage on smaller ones.

skills.name: Skyliner
skills.description: Slashes across a group of enemies.

skills.name: Fury
skills.description: Maximises Attack SPD by using whole bodys energy. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Dread Worm
skills.description: Brandishes a sword in a sweeping motion, striking terror into the hearts of your enemies.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within 3m width

skills.description: Advances upon enemies with 7 consecutive slashes.
